---
title: "test_daemon_singleton_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_daemon_singleton_empire.py"
loc: 32
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.15
style_score: 3.61
intel_score: 6.40
overall_score: 4.60
---

## Intent
The `test_daemon_singleton_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_daemon_singleton_lock_creation, test_daemon_detects_existing_lock. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_daemon_singleton_lock_creation, test_daemon_detects_existing_lock. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.main_loop](file://src.sentinel.main_loop)

### Exports
- `test_daemon_singleton_lock_creation`
- `test_daemon_detects_existing_lock`
